summary: Request Quote feature testing completed. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Default threshold is 150m². When quantity >= 150, 'Request Quote' button appears instead of 'Add to Cart'. Quote modal collects customer details and submits successfully to backend.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/shop/products/{id}/quote-status correctly calculates show_quote_button based on quantity vs threshold (default 150m²)
Backend supports quote_disabled query param to force show Add to Cart button
Backend supports custom_threshold query param to override default 150m² threshold
Backend POST /api/shop/quotes/request correctly creates quote with auto-generated quote_ref (QR-NNNNN format)
Backend GET /api/shop/quotes/config returns global quote settings
Backend PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/bulk-quote-settings allows admin to disable/enable quotes per product
Frontend TileDetailPage.js correctly checks quote status when quantity changes (useEffect with tile and quantity dependencies)
Frontend shows 'Add to Cart' for quantity < 150m²
Frontend shows 'Request Quote' button for quantity >= 150m²
Frontend shows 'Large Order - Custom Pricing Available' notice when quote button is displayed
Quote modal contains: product summary, name, email, phone, company (optional), delivery postcode, project details (optional), preferred contact method
Quote modal correctly submits and displays success toast with quote reference number
All form fields have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Quote requests are created during testing with unique quote IDs (QR-01004 etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Request Quote feature fully tested. Test tile: alabaster-30x60cm-polished. Default quote threshold is 150m². Quote modal works correctly with all form fields. Backend stores quotes in quote_requests collection with quote_ref format QR-NNNNN.

tests_executed.notes: Returns show_quote_button=false even for large quantities
Check status -> show button -> submit quote all working

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Add to Cart button visible for small qty (1m²)
tests_executed.notes: Screenshot confirms Add to Cart button displayed

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Request Quote button visible for large qty (200m²)
tests_executed.notes: Screenshot confirms Request Quote button and 'Big Project' notice

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Quote modal opens on Request Quote click
tests_executed.notes: Modal shows product summary, all form fields with data-testid
Form submits successfully, shows toast with quote ID (QR-01004), modal closes

feature_summary.description: When customer quantity exceeds threshold (default 150m²), 'Add to Cart' button is replaced with 'Request Quote'. Quote modal collects customer details and submits to backend.

ui_components_verified.large_order_notice: Amber box with 'Large Order - Custom Pricing Available' text

threshold_behavior.quote_disabled_flag: If product has quote_disabled=true, always shows 'Add to Cart'
